stemHtml: If the main oil filter of a gas turbine engine becomes clogged, oil to the main bearings is still assured:

options.a: if breather pressure in the main compartments is increased to ensure positive lubrication of the bearings.
options.b: because the oil filter bypass valve opens.
options.c: because fuel upstream of the oil filter will be mixed with oil to allow easier passage through the filter.
options.d: if a higher engine rpm is selected to increase oil pressure.
